module.name: __future__
module.reason: Including as part of the non-excluded parts of standard library.

module.name: __parents_main__
module.reason: Auto enable multiprocessing freeze support

module.name: __parents_main__-preLoad
module.reason: Scrubbing multiprocessing fork arguments from sys.argv.
